mnemonics: DEEP REVIEW: Data-hungry models Excel at Pattern recognition in visual, language, and reinforcement tasks
keyPoints: Deep learning excels in computer vision (e.g., image recognition, object detection)
Natural language processing is a major application area (e.g., machine translation, text generation)
Reinforcement learning combined with deep learning achieves superhuman performance in complex games and robotics
commonMistakes: Assuming deep learning is always the best solution, even for problems with small datasets
Confusing supervised learning applications (e.g., classification) with reinforcement learning applications (e.g., game AI)
Overlooking the computational resources and data requirements needed for training deep learning models
